prompt: A yoga class in a beautiful sunlit studio. Six people on mats in tree pose, arms raised overhead, balanced and focused. Warm golden morning light flooding through large windows on the left. Bamboo floors, white walls, minimal decor. Shot from a wide angle at the back of the room, capturing the full group and the depth of the space. No faces directly toward camera. Aspirational, calm, communal energy. Lifestyle wellness photography, warm golden tones, cinematic composition.

A yoga instructor leading a small class through a flowing transition, arms sweeping upward in unison. Shot from a low angle at the side of the room. Bright, airy studio with diffused window light creating soft silhouettes. Movement and breath captured mid-flow. Bodies in motion, no direct eye contact with camera. Lifestyle wellness photography, bright warm tones, wide panoramic framing.

A private yoga lesson in a bright studio. An instructor kneeling beside a student, hands gently adjusting the student's hip alignment in pigeon pose. Both seen from the side, faces turned away. Warm window light, empty spacious room around them. Personal, attentive, unhurried. Lifestyle wellness photography, soft warm natural tones.

A group of five people mid-flow in a vinyasa class, transitioning from high lunge to warrior II. Arms extended wide, legs grounded. Shot from the corner of the room capturing diagonal depth. Morning light from tall windows, warm wood floor, clean white walls. Dynamic and synchronized. No direct eye contact with camera. Lifestyle wellness photography, warm high-contrast tones.

A pilates mat class with four people performing a teaser pose — legs and torso both raised in a V shape, arms reaching forward. Shot from the side at mat level, capturing the line of bodies in parallel. Bright natural light, clean studio environment. Strength and control visible in the postures. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle fitness photography, crisp warm tones.

A small prenatal yoga class with three women in cat-cow pose on hands and knees, backs gently arching. Shot from a low side angle across the mats. Soft diffused light from a window, bolsters and blankets stacked nearby. Gentle, supportive, grounded atmosphere. No direct eye contact with camera. Lifestyle wellness photography, warm soft muted tones.
